columns.extraction_plan: Not reported. The PDF does not report overall response rates (complete or partial) for the treatment arm (ADT plus docetaxel).

Not reported. The PDF does not explicitly report progression of disease rates for the treatment arm (ADT plus docetaxel) as a percentage of the total patients. However, the time to clinical progression is reported in Table 2.
